title: ivesia gordonii var. pygmaea
intro: Ivesia gordonii var. pygmaea, also known as Pygmy Ivesia, is a plant species native to North America, characterized by its small size and delicate appearance. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pygmy Ivesia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
